title: ProjectContext
description: Engagement/project record propagated from tenant-control to demand-graph and experiment-attribution, per docs/architecture/contract-catalog.md:22.
$comment: compat_class: open (plan §2 row 'context/project-context'; plan §5 acceptance matrix 'WorkspaceContext / ProjectContext | open'). Authority: contract-catalog.md:22 (owner tenant-control per ADR-0007, producer tenant-control -> demand-graph/experiment-attr, idempotency key project_id, sensitivity internal/customer-proprietary); tenancy-model.md:40 Identifier set ('project_id | engagement/project'). Field set is intentionally THIN (project_id + tenant_id only): engagement metadata (client name, contract terms, scope description, etc.) is EXCLUDED from v1 because no authoritative source maps out those fields — there is no citation for an engagement-metadata field list anywhere in ADR-0014, contract-catalog.md, or tenancy-model.md, so it remains OPEN and is deferred to a later minor/major revision once a citation exists, rather than being invented here.

project_id.$comment: tenancy-model.md:40 Identifier set — 'engagement/project'. Format OPEN (issuer runtime convention, W1 opaque) per common/identifiers $defs.project_id.

tenant_id.$comment: Tenant discriminator — every project belongs to exactly one tenant (tenancy-model.md hard isolation boundary).
